text:
お前の熟達した動きが
オレの目に焼き付いて離れない。

お前はオレの知る限りにおいて
ただ一人の、理屈でなくセンスで動ける
天性のハンターだ。

今回もオレのほうが学ぶべき局面が
多々あるかもしれないが
Ｓランククリアを期

I'll tell you, I shake the memory of seeing you
at work out in the field out of my head.

I'd by lying if I said I'd never seen anyone
who moved like they were born to be a Hunter
the way you do.

This time around I'll probably be the one
to come away from this having learned
more, but I hope you'll push for that S
Rank nonetheless.
